case_title: NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT ASGNE OF SBC VS. SHIRLEY SETEFANO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-07-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT ASGNE OF SBC AS TO DEFENDANT SETEFANO, SHIRLEY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-17-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT ASGNE OF SBC SERVED SEP-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SETEFANO, SHIRLEY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-07-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
